why.sectionSubtitle: We combine local expertise with international standards to provide the most reliable transport network in the ECOWAS region.
why.heroCardDesc: For VIP and corporate clients, we provide trained security personnel to accompany trips — ensuring total peace of mind across all borders.
why.borderCardDesc: Skip the hassle. Our team handles all documentation and protocols at every checkpoint.
why.privateCardDesc: No shared rides. The entire vehicle is yours for the journey.
why.fleetCardDesc: Modern, air-conditioned vehicles with full amenities and verified drivers.

cta.title: Ready to Travel West Africa?
cta.subtitle: Book your premium cross-border transport today. Comfortable, safe, and reliable.
cta.sectionSubtitle: Book a private cross-border ride today. Expert border assistance, premium vehicles, and bilingual drivers — all included.

footer.tagline: Premium multilingual transport across West Africa.

ridesPage.selectRoutePlaceholder: Choose your departure and destination city...

toursPage.title: West African Tours
toursPage.subtitle: Discover the history, culture and coastlines of West Africa with our curated packages. All tours include Beninfy transport and expert local guides.
toursPage.customDesc: Looking for a bespoke itinerary? We design custom tour packages for families, corporates, and groups of any size.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: We are West Africa's most trusted private cross-border transport and logistics company — connecting Nigeria, Benin, Togo and Ghana with premium vehicles and expert border assistance.
aboutPage.storyTitle: Built for the West African Traveller
aboutPage.storyP1: Beninfy was founded to solve a real problem — cross-border travel between Nigeria, Benin, Togo, and Ghana was unreliable, stressful, and dangerous. We built a service that combines premium vehicles, professional drivers, and expert border handlers to deliver a seamless journey.
aboutPage.storyP2: Today, we operate 5 official routes across 4 countries, serving corporate executives, diplomatic missions, families and tourists with the highest standards of safety and comfort.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Every vehicle is GPS-tracked, every driver verified. Security escorts available for VIP clients.
aboutPage.value2Desc: One price, no surprises. Every border fee is disclosed upfront, in Nigerian Naira.
aboutPage.value3Desc: English and French communication throughout — from booking to border crossing.

fleetPage.heroSubtitle: Discover the pinnacle of West African logistics. From executive saloons to high-capacity coastal buses, we redefine luxury travel with professional standards.
fleetPage.customDesc: Corporate convoys, diplomatic escorts, or large group travel — we can accommodate any requirement.

borderInfoPage.heroSubtitle: We handle all border crossings on your behalf. Know exactly what to expect — no hidden fees, no surprises.
borderInfoPage.handle1Desc: Our agents review your passport, ECOWAS ID, and Yellow Fever certificate before departure.
borderInfoPage.handle2Desc: We navigate official fast-track lanes to minimize your time at border checkpoints.
borderInfoPage.handle3Desc: 24/7 WhatsApp and phone support throughout your crossing — any time, any border.
borderInfoPage.feesSubtitle: Fees below are official government charges. Beninfy's service fee is included in your quoted ride price.
borderInfoPage.ctaSubtitle: Book a ride now and let Beninfy handle every aspect of your border crossing.

bookPage.pageSubtitle: Provide passenger details for your executive border crossing.
bookPage.fieldSpecialPlaceholder: Dietary needs, accessibility requirements, VIP escort...
bookPage.dropoffPlaceholder: Full street address or hotel name
bookPage.borderNoticeDesc: Beninfy handles all border documentation, customs clearance, and immigration facilitation on your behalf. Ensure your passport is valid for at least 6 months and you have a Yellow Fever certificate.
bookPage.guaranteeDesc: All payments held in escrow until your journey completes. 24/7 support.

payPage.mobileInfo: After confirming, you'll receive a payment prompt on your mobile number. Supports MTN MoMo, Orange Money, and T-Money.
payPage.bankRef: Use your booking reference as payment description.
payPage.termsNote: By paying you agree to our
payPage.guaranteeDesc: All payments held in escrow until your journey completes. 24/7 support included.

confirmedPage.whatsNextDesc: Our team will contact you within {hours} hours to finalize your personalized pickup details and border clearance protocols.
confirmedPage.needHelp: Need immediate assistance with your crossing?
